HGSS.594.0000:
What you see here is how much people
around the world love Pokémon.\f
Watching Battle Videos lets you share
the fun these people had.
HGSS.594.0001:
This is a great idea.
Anyone and everyone can participate.\f
Even if you lose, that battle could still
become an outstanding Battle Video.
HGSS.594.0002:
What stunning, gripping Battle Videos!
Should I go home and retrain\r
my Pokémon?
HGSS.594.0003:
My Battle Videos starring only cute
little MARILL are the ones I like best.
HGSS.594.0004:
What an amazing collection!
I can see why this is so popular.\f
Just seeing some of these Battle Videos
makes me feel tougher!
HGSS.594.0005:
To treat one’s self to Battle Videos
every day...\f
I would consider that a hobby worthy
of a true gentleman.
HGSS.594.0006:
My mysterious Battle Video.
My mysterious Battle Video.\f
What’s on it?
What’s on it?\f
It’s a mystery!
It’s a mystery! And I mean it!
HGSS.594.0007:
Let me attempt the alphabet rap using
Goldenrod, dig?\f
G... Go south from here for the
Ilex Forest.\f
O... Over land is not where you’ll find
the Goldenrod Tunnel.\f
L... Looking like criminals in their black
pajamas is Team Rocket.\f
D... Um... D... is...
Yeah, I know, lame-o.\r
You give it a try!
HGSS.594.0008:
The Hiker enjoying the Box Data down
on 2F is my little brother.
HGSS.594.0009:
Warps to the GTS and the Trainer
Rankings on 1F.
HGSS.594.0010:
Warps to the studios for Box Data and
Dress-Up Data on 2F.
HGSS.594.0011:
Connect to Nintendo Wi-Fi
Connection for Battle Videos? [0200,0000]
HGSS.594.0012:
Here, you may post a Battle Video of
your Pokémon.\f
You may also view Battle Videos posted
by other Trainers.\f
The Battle Videos may be sorted by
Pokémon, battle facility, and so on.\f
The Battle Video you post will be
assigned a 12-digit number.\f
Your friends may view your Battle Video
by entering this 12-digit code here.\f
